/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/4.0.16/libexec/emcc -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=createKlystrack -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s ENVIRONMENT=web,worker -s INITIAL_MEMORY=4194304 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=[_malloc,_free,_klys_init,_klys_load_song,_klys_free_song,_klys_decode,_klys_pause,_klys_stop,_klys_get_song_position,_klys_get_pattern_position,_klys_get_song_speed,_klys_get_song_speed2,_klys_get_song_rate,_klys_get_num_channels,_klys_get_song_length,_klys_get_num_instruments,_klys_get_num_patterns,_klys_get_pattern_length,_klys_get_title,_klys_get_instrument_name,_klys_get_loop_point,_klys_get_master_volume,_klys_get_flags,_klys_get_pattern_data,_klys_get_sequence_data,_klys_get_instrument_data,_klys_get_track_status,_klys_is_playing] -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=[ccall,cwrap,setValue,getValue,UTF8ToString] -s FILESYSTEM=0 -s INVOKE_RUN=0 -O2 @CMakeFiles/Klystrack.dir/objects1.rsp -o /Users/spot/Code/DEViLBOX/public/klystrack/Klystrack.js
